title: Automatic timeline recalculation from changed task duration or dependencies
excerpt:

posts.author: Erstwhile (Joseph White)
posts.cookedHtml:
After entering tasks with dependencies and duration specified, and specifying a date for base project start milestone, the timelines are NOT automatically calculated.

To make things worse, after proceeding with entering timeline values manually, if a change to a task duration is made the timeline is NOT recalculated.

What am I missing – the “automatic” calculation and recalculation based on task durations and dependencies has been a basic capability of project management software for many decades.

Please help me find what I am missing concerning automatic calculation of timelines
